content.problemStatement:
For an undirected tree with NNN nodes and N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 edges, where each node is colored either red or blue, define two sets S1S_1S1‚Äč and S2S_2S2‚Äč as follows:


S1={dis(u,v)‚ą£1‚Č§u<v‚Č§N}S_1 = \{dis(u,v) \mid 1 \leq u \lt v \leq N\}S1‚Äč={dis(u,v)‚ą£1‚Č§u<v‚Č§N}
S2={dis(u,v)‚ą£1‚Č§u<v‚Č§N,coloru‚Č†colorv}S_2 = \{dis(u,v) \mid 1 \leq u \lt v \leq N, color_u \neq color_v\}S2‚Äč={dis(u,v)‚ą£1‚Č§u<v‚Č§N,coloru‚ÄčÓÄ†=colorv‚Äč} ,

where dis(u,v)=dis(u,v) = dis(u,v)= number of edges on the simple path between uuu and vvv.
**Note:** Sets S1S_1S1‚Äč and S2S_2S2‚Äč only contain **distinct** elements.

We call the coloring good if S1=S2S_1 = S_2S1‚Äč=S2‚Äč.

Let CRC_RCR‚Äč and CBC_BCB‚Äč denote the number of nodes that are colored red and blue respectively.

Given an undirected tree with NNN nodes and N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 edges, find a good coloring of the tree such that the value of ‚ą£CR‚ąíCB‚ą£|C_R - C_B|‚ą£CR‚Äč‚ąíCB‚Äč‚ą£ is **minimized**.

It can be shown that a good coloring always exists. If there are multiple good colorings with the minimum value of ‚ą£CR‚ąíCB‚ą£|C_R - C_B|‚ą£CR‚Äč‚ąíCB‚Äč‚ą£, you may output any of them.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN ‚ÄĒ the number of vertices of the tree.
The next N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines describe the edges of the tree. The ithi^{th}ith of these N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines contains two space-separated integers uiu_iui‚Äč and viv_ivi‚Äč, denoting an edge between nodes uiu_iui‚Äč and viv_ivi‚Äč.




Output Format
For each test case, output a string SSS of length NNN, where Si=RS_i = RSi‚Äč=R if node iii is colored red or Si=BS_i = BSi‚Äč=B if node iii is colored blue.


Note that string SSS should represent a good coloring of the tree such that the value of ‚ą£CR‚ąíCB‚ą£|C_R - C_B|‚ą£CR‚Äč‚ąíCB‚Äč‚ą£ is **minimized**.


If there are multiple good colorings with the minimum value of ‚ą£CR‚ąíCB‚ą£|C_R - C_B|‚ą£CR‚Äč‚ąíCB‚Äč‚ą£, you may output any possible string.
constraints: The edges in the input form a tree.
The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 200020002000.
